demo.title: verify.sh
demo.code:
# 100% FREE — no wallet, no account, no trust in IronBridge.
# Verify a single seal and get its shareable proof URL:
bankr prompt "Use ironbridge-verify on seal d65cfca527650f61 and show its /proof URL"

# Re-walk the whole public seal chain and confirm it links end-to-end:
bankr prompt "Use ironbridge-verify to re-walk the seal chain and confirm every row links"

# Check another agent's claimed result before trusting it:
bankr prompt "Use ironbridge-verify on receipt <rid> and recompute request_sha256 + data_sha256"

setup: Nothing to install and nothing to fund — verification is plain HTTP and always free.
Re-walk rule: each chain row's prev_hash must equal the previous row's entry_hash; any disclosed discontinuity is listed in known_breaks (honest history, not a rewrite).
Shareable evidence: every seal has a human page at /proof/<seal_id> that anyone can open and re-walk with no wallet.
